texto: I will greet this day with love in my heart. And how will I do this? Henceforth will I look on all things with love and be born again. I will love the sun for it warms my bones
autor: yet I will love the rain for it cleanses my spirit. I will love the light for it shows me the way
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de yet I will love the rain for it cleanses my spirit. I will love the light for it shows me the way que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “I will greet this day with love in my heart. And how will I do this? Henceforth will I look on al…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, inspiracional, reflexao, com foco em inspiracao e reflexao.
